svg.title: Object Diagram: Admin Performs System Management Tasks

g.text: Object Diagram: Admin Performs System Management Tasks
Admin Wong Mei Ling performs administrative tasks:
verifies new doctor Dr. Rajesh Kumar, resolves patient support
ticket about database access, and views system analytics dashboard.
Doctor verification, support ticket resolution, analytics
Description = "I cannot view my medical records from last month. The page shows an error message."
Description = "I cannot view my medical records from last month..."

ResponseText = "Thank you for reporting this issue. I've identified the problem - there was a database sync issue. I've resolved it and your records should now be accessible. Please try again and let me know if you still face any issues."
Description = "Failed login attempt - account locked after multiple attempts"
